title: FGR Recovers MXN $62.8 Million in State Reparations from Estafa Maestra Officials
detail: Mexico's FGR (Fiscalía General de la República) obtained a court-ordered state reparation of 62.8 million pesos from two former officials implicated in the 'Estafa Maestra' corruption scheme — the MXN $7.67 billion fraud carried out during Peña Nieto's administration by routing federal funds through 11 public universities to ghost companies. The recovery represented a partial accounting of the massive fraud, which had largely escaped criminal consequences after SCJN acquitted former SEDESOL Secretary Rosario Robles in October 2024.

media.caption: El Financiero reports FGR's recovery of 62.8 million pesos in Estafa Maestra reparations
